vibe_check.keywords: Feeling "washed." Despair, lack of faith, or losing your "spark" to cynicism.
vibe_check.narrative: You’re feeling "washed." You’ve lost faith in the vision. The "Star" feels too far away to reach. You’re letting cynicism win. Remember: the night is darkest just before the "Sun" comes up.
Wealth without Peace. Realizing that financial success does not equate to personal fulfillment or family harmony. The hollow victory of the grind.

vibe_check.keywords: Tunnel vision. Staying in your lane and driving toward the goal with intense willpower. Victory.
vibe_check.narrative: Tunnel vision activated. You have the reins of two different "horses"—maybe your day job and your passion project—and you’re making them run in the same direction. Victory is the only option. Stay in your lane and drive.
"Mean Girl" energy. Using your charisma to manipulate or "gatekeep" the scene. Jealousy is a bad look on you.
Information Toxicity. Clouded judgment due to misinformation or the "loud and wrong" influence of the collective feed.
Releasing the Pain. The healing process after a digital fallout. Forgiving oneself and others for past conflicts and moving beyond the "pain-body."
Creative dormancy. The inability to find the "why" behind the work. The fire has gone out, requiring a period of rest or a change in environment.

vibe_check.keywords: Unfinished business. "Emotional baggage" in the cloud.
vibe_check.narrative: The Phoenix Protocol. A recovery from absolute depletion. The realization that once the worst has happened, the only remaining direction is upward.

vibe_check.keywords: Hit rock bottom. The "absolute end" of a mental cycle.
vibe_check.narrative: Total System Failure. Reaching rock bottom in a mental or digital cycle. The end of a painful narrative that has finally exhausted itself.
The Aesthetic Facade. Maintaining a "perfect" appearance on the social grid while feeling hollow and disconnected in reality. A crisis of authenticity.

cusp_analysis.summary: Focus on Capricorn qualities within your cusp placement.
